title: Database Health Response
description: Standard response schema for database health check endpoints in both Backend and AI Service packages.

status.description: Overall database health status based on connectivity and performance thresholds.

available.description: Number of available connections in the pool (can be immediately used).

idle.description: Number of idle connections in the pool (opened but not currently executing queries).

used.description: Number of active connections currently executing queries.

total.description: Total number of connections in the pool (idle + used). Should equal configured pool size when healthy.

p50.description: 50th percentile (median) query execution time in milliseconds over the last sample period.

p95.description: 95th percentile query execution time in milliseconds. Should be < 200ms under normal load.

p99.description: 99th percentile query execution time in milliseconds.

slow_queries_last_5m.description: Count of queries that exceeded 1 second in the last 5 minutes. Used for alerting.

pgvector.description: Status of pgvector extension. Must be 'enabled' for AI features.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the health check was generated (UTC).
